Setting.PowerCoresMaxHint: How many {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCores}} the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}} starts each round with.
Setting.ContactDesignationHint: How unidentified contacts are named on the Sensor Radar.
Setting.SweepGatedPositionsHint: Blip positions on the Sensor Radar only update when the sweep arm passes over them, like a real phosphor radar. Positions may lag up to one full sweep rotation (~9 seconds).

Engineer.ManageHeatDesc: Spend auxiliary power and roll Engineering to perform cooling rites. Reduce heat by power spent + SL (min 1).
Engineer.FluxToChargeTooltip: Spend 1 Voidshield Flux to gain 1 Auxiliary Power.

Warning.NoPowerCores: No {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCores}} available. The {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}} must have cores in reserve.
Warning.OnlyComponents: Only Ship Components may be installed on this ship.
Warning.HeatMaxed: Ship heat is at maximum - cannot fire plasma cannon.

Helm.MinMoveMomentumTooltip: Minimum move: {val} {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnitAbbr}} of momentum will carry the ship forward automatically if no thrust is applied.
Helm.ConfirmNote: Ship will proceed to projected position.
Helm.PilotingSLTooltip: Roll Piloting (Major Ship) to generate Helm SL for Speed, Maneuverability, and Evasion allocation.
Helm.SpeedTooltip: Speed {val}: at 100% power the ship moves {val} {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnits}}.
Helm.MinMoveTooltip: Min. Move {val}: the ship must move at least this many {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnits}} (half last turn's movement, rounded up). Drifts in the bearing direction.

Ordnance.RecallCraftDesc: Immediately recover one friendly strike craft within 3 {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnits}}. Cannot be cancelled.

Desc.overdriveCommand: Grant every role an additional {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}. The {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}} may take an additional action this round.
Desc.doubleShift: Grant the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}} an additional action this round.
Desc.hardenShields: This round, weapons with the Shield Bypass trait cannot bypass the ship's void shields.
Desc.devastationProtocol: Sets stance to Devastation Protocol: all outgoing and incoming hits are automatic critical hits.

Core.BCPrompt: Choose an enemy to designate as the priority target. All weapons fired at this target gain +10 accuracy, 2 armour penetration, and 2 void shield burn this round.

BattleClarity.desc: Nominate one enemy token. All weapons striking that target gain +10 accuracy and pierce 2 void shields this round.

Dialog.EndCombatBody: Are you sure you want to end the ship combat? All round state will be preserved in the combat log.
Dialog.OverdriveBody: Redline the plasma manifolds to surge the ship well beyond rated speed, adding 100% to the power bar for this helm activation. Consumes one {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}. Proceed?
Dialog.FlipAndBurnBody: Fire the attitude thrusters to flip the ship 180°, then burn — the ship decelerates along its original trajectory at 50% speed, moving sternward. Consumes one {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}. Proceed?
Dialog.RamSelectTarget: Select a target to ram. The ship will arc along the projected course.

Action.PilotStandardDesc: Move the ship at its base Speed along current heading.
Action.PilotStrafeDesc: Activate lateral attitude thrusters to translate the ship sideways without changing heading. Useful for repositioning against a target without exposing the flanks.
Action.PilotRetrogradeDesc: Fire the bow thrusters in opposition to forward momentum. Each unit of thrust reduces the minimum-move obligation by one {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnit}}; thrust in excess of the obligation propels the ship sternward.
Action.PilotOverdriveDesc: Redline the plasma manifolds, flooding the drive chambers with raw reactor output to surge the ship well beyond its rated speed ceiling. Adds 100% to the power bar for this helm activation.
Action.PilotFlipAndBurnDesc: Fire the attitude thrusters hard over to spin the ship 180°, then ignite the plasma drives — the ship decelerates along its original trajectory, moving forward at half-speed. Requires and consumes 50% power. Consumes one {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}.

Sensors.FocusedScanDesc: Free action (once per turn). Roll Sensor; gain Sensor base rate + positive SL as Power.
Sensors.BreachAnalysisDesc: Upgrade to Lock 2. Reveals voidshield percentages per sector on the target.
Sensors.DeepScanDesc: Upgrade to Lock 3. Reveals armour, voidshield values, hull, and weapon fire arcs per sector. Shows actual ship name.
Sensors.DesignateTorpedoDesc: Lock the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Sensors}}'s targeting onto a hostile torpedo to prevent it from being helmed for 1 round. Alternatively, designate a friendly torpedo to double its speed (movement range) this turn.
Sensors.RangeAmplifierDesc: Overclock the sensor lattice: auto-scan range is doubled for 2 rounds.

Payload.SensorBuoyDesc: Reduces all {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Sensors}} action AP costs by 20% this round. The discounted cost rounds up to the nearest whole AP.

weaponsSensors.medium: One weapon section disabled; sensor offline (lock upgrades blocked).
weaponsSensors.high: All weapons: −20 to hit; one weapon section disabled; sensor offline.

Trait.ShieldBypassDesc: Hits bypass void shields entirely - hull damage is applied directly without shield absorption.
Trait.ShieldBurnDesc: Each hit absorbed by shields drains this many additional void flux on top of the standard 1.
Trait.RendDesc: Each hit that gets through void shields permanently reduces sector armour by this value - even if armour absorbs all resulting hull damage. The armour reduction still occurs regardless of whether hull damage is dealt.

ExtendRange.desc: Double the sensor band size for your next weapon attack, increasing its effective engagement range.
